data.description: The positive circumstances surrounding a d20 roll
The presence of advantage reflects the positive circumstance surrounding a d20 roll.

features.name: Jack-of-All-Trades
features.description: The bard can add their proficiency bonus to any ability check they make that doesn't already include their proficiency bonus.

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.description: When you roll a 1 on an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, you can use the result as a disadvantage on one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw of your choice that takes effect immediately.

data.description: the positive circumstances surrounding a d20 roll
The DUNGEONS& DRAGONS game consists of a group of characters embarking on an adventure that the Dungeon Master presents to them.

name: Compare the total to a target number

data.description: Ifthe total equals or exceeds the target number, the ability check, attack roll, or saving throw is a success.
